Usage:
  circleci init [flags]

Examples:
# Initialize CircleCI from the current repository
$ circleci init

# Preview the init flow help
$ circleci init --help

# Run init after creating a local git repository
$ git init && circleci init


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
